payload.expression: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM obj_0c8a7b10_1111_4a00_8000_000000000104 s WHERE s.thread_id = {{params.self}} AND s.user_id = {{params.viewer}}) AS enabled

params.name: self
params.description: The ch-thread row's item id (bound from the row).

payload.description: ch-thread.isNotificationsEnabled (perViewer) — true when a ch-thread-subscription item exists for (viewer, thread).
